name: Mobile Robot Odometry Drift Analysis
description: A robotics engineer must evaluate the dead-reckoning accuracy of a differential-drive AMR before deploying it in a warehouse. Evaluate the odometry drift of a Pioneer P3DX mobile robot in CoppeliaSim by comparing integrated wheel encoder velocities against ground-truth positions. The evaluation must involve a multi-segment trajectory of at least 10 seconds covering at least 1.0m of translation and 1.0rad of rotation. Save the time-series data (including odom_x, odom_y, true_x, true_y, error_m) to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/odometry_track.csv and aggregate statistics to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/odometry_summary.json. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
